name: mailto-link-form
description: Local development tooling for the mailto-link-form plugin

scripts.wp:cli: docker run --rm --network wpmlf-net -e WORDPRESS_DB_HOST=wpmlf-db:3306 -e WORDPRESS_DB_USER=wordpress -e WORDPRESS_DB_PASSWORD=wordpress -e WORDPRESS_DB_NAME=wordpress -v wpmlf-wp-data:/var/www/html wordpress:cli-php8.2 wp --info
